body:
<!-- Provide a clear description of the content -->
Store `reverse_mode` in the `IntervalMesh` struct, so that we can access it when writing and reading the mesh for restarts. This is necessary for restarting land runs with a non-uniform grid stretching.

Tested in ClimaLand CI [here](https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-ci/builds/6899) and restart tests pass

Also updates the docs to correctly explain how to use the formatter, and tags a release.

Closes #2372
title: store reverse_mode in IntervalMesh; tag release
